name_cn:
Genuine leather
Denim Bag
Loewe Shell Tote Series Handbag Model 4202 Small
Made of denim and cowhide. Its sturdy base and soft crescent body, paired with an Anagram charm and unique knotted strap, are fashionable, generous, and spacious
Dimensions 39-28-12🔔 Very stylish. The bag is very lightweight, a must-have for outings!
